cafeterias.name: The Quad Grill
cafeterias.description: Home-style meals and grilled favourites, served fresh daily at the main quad.

menu.name: Smoky Beef Burger
menu.description: Juicy beef patty with caramelised onions, cheddar, and smoky BBQ sauce.

menu.name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
menu.description: Tender grilled chicken with fresh vegetables and garlic herb sauce.

menu.name: Tropical Mango Smoothie
menu.description: A refreshing blend of ripe mangoes, banana, and a splash of passion fruit.

cafeterias.name: Madaraka Bites
cafeterias.description: Quick bites and Kenyan classics — chapati, pilau, and more from the heart of campus.

menu.name: Chicken Pilau
menu.description: Aromatic spiced rice cooked with tender chicken pieces and fresh herbs.

menu.name: Chapati & Bean Stew
menu.description: Soft layered chapati served with a rich, hearty bean stew.

menu.name: Fresh Passion Juice
menu.description: Freshly squeezed passion fruit juice, naturally sweet and tangy.
